description: Major data storage company producing HDDs, SSDs, and flash memory products. Manufacturing partner with Kioxia for NAND flash. Spun off Sandisk flash memory business.

_externalRelationships.notes: Sold out 2026 HDD production capacity for AI data centers. Sold $3.17B Sandisk stake. Market cap +340% in 1 year.

_metadata.notes: Strong AI-driven HDD demand. Long-running Kioxia JV for NAND manufacturing.
